text: Last class we learned directions in the city.
Today we make plans and invite friends.
Invite
Plan
Weekend
Tonight
Party
Movie
Let us go to the movie.
Would you like to come to my party?
I would love to! What time?
I am sorry, I cannot tonight.
Let us meet on the weekend.
Hi, Marcos! I want to invite you. Would you like to come to my party?
I would love to! When is the party?
On Saturday, on the weekend. Not tonight.
Great! And let us go to the movie on Sunday too.
Good plan! So we have a busy weekend.
Yes! See you at the party. Thank you for the invite!

Hi, this is a message for you. I have good news. We have a small party at my house on Saturday night. It is for my birthday. Would you like to come? There is food, there is music, and many friends come too. The party starts at seven. My house is easy to find. Please call me and tell me yes or no. I really hope you can come. It is more fun with you. See you soon, I hope. Bye!

Hey, it is me. I want to make a plan for this weekend. Let us do something fun together. On Saturday, let us go to the movie. There is a new film, and it looks great. Then on Sunday, let us meet for lunch. I know a nice place near the river. Tonight I am busy, but the weekend is free. Tell me what you think. Call me back when you can. I would love to see you. Talk soon!
First, call your friend. Then say, would you like to come to my party? Next, give the day and the time. After that, your friend says yes. Finally, you say, great, see you on Saturday.

Let us go to the movie tonight.
Would you like to come to my party?
We have a plan for the weekend.
I would love to. What time?
My birthday party is on Saturday.
I am sorry, I cannot tonight.
Let us go to the movie.
Let us meet on the weekend.
